code:
import io
import string
import list

fn main() -> Result<Unit, String>
  let line1 = io.read_line().ok_or("missing line 1")?
  let line2 = io.read_line().ok_or("missing line 2")?
  let tokens = string.split_whitespace(line1)
  let target = string.parse_int(string.trim(line2)).ok_or("invalid target")?
  mut nums: List<Int> = []
  mut ti = 0
  while ti < tokens.len()
    let tok = tokens.get(ti).ok_or("oob")?
    let n = string.parse_int(tok).ok_or("invalid int")?
    nums = list.push(nums, n)
    ti = ti + 1
  end
  mut found = false
  mut fi = 0
  mut fj = 0
  mut i = 0
  let n_len = list.len(nums)
  while i < n_len and not found
    mut j = i + 1
    while j < n_len and not found
      let a = list.get(nums, i).ok_or("oob")?
      let b = list.get(nums, j).ok_or("oob")?
      if a + b == target
        found = true
        fi = i
        fj = j
      end
      j = j + 1
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  if found
    println("found=#{fi},#{fj}")
  else
    println("none")
  end
  Ok(())
end
